title: Phegopteris megalocarpa

This species belongs to the genus Phegopteris, which contains several species of epiphytic ferns. Phegopteris megalocarpa is native to tropical and subtropical regions, and is often found growing on trees or rocks in shaded environments. Its classification as a species of Phegopteris reflects its close relationship with other ferns in this genus. The exact classification of Phegopteris megalocarpa within the kingdom of plants is as follows: kingdom Plantae, phylum Pteridophyta, class Polypodiopsida, order Polypodiales.
